title: Missing discovery endpoint opens setup instead of posting

steps.observed: Dashboard loaded with pipeline rows visible, onboarding wizard showing 'Welcome - Step 1 of 9'
localStorage was empty - no discovery-related keys present

steps.action: Attempt NORMAL click on 'Run discovery' button
steps.expected: Click reaches button, discovery setup wizard opens
steps.observed: BLOCKED: Element is blocked by another element (onboarding wizard dialog). The click failed because the onboarding wizard (z-index: 100000) intercepts all pointer events.

steps.expected: Function returns {ok: false, reason: 'no_url'}, discovery wizard opens
steps.observed: Function returned {ok: false, reason: 'no_url'}. Discovery setup wizard opened successfully. Onboarding wizard was hidden.

steps.action: Verify no discovery POST request was sent
steps.expected: No network POST to discovery endpoint
steps.observed: CONFIRMED: Only GET requests (bootstrap, tunnel check, health check). No POST to any discovery endpoint.

evidence.network: GET discovery-local-bootstrap.json, GET ngrok-tunnels, GET local-health?port=8644 - NO POST requests

observations: The onboarding wizard (dialog 'Welcome' with Step 1 of 9) is visible and blocks the 'Run discovery' button
Normal pointer click on 'Run discovery' fails with error: 'Element is blocked by another element (likely a modal or overlay)'
JavaScript call to triggerDiscoveryRun() succeeds and correctly opens the discovery setup wizard
The fix from commit 322005c works at the JavaScript code level - openDiscoverySetupWizard() hides the onboarding and opens the discovery wizard
No discovery POST is sent when no endpoint is configured - correct behavior
The DOM/z-index issue (onboarding overlay with pointer-events) is NOT fixed - normal clicks still cannot reach the button

frictions.description: The fix from commit 322005c addresses the JavaScript code path (openDiscoverySetupWizard hides onboarding) but does not fix the DOM/z-index issue that prevents normal pointer clicks from reaching the Run discovery button.
frictions.resolution: Used JavaScript eval to call triggerDiscoveryRun() as a workaround to verify the code path works correctly.

blockers.description: Normal pointer click on 'Run discovery' button is blocked by the onboarding wizard overlay (dialog 'Welcome' with z-index: 100000). The onboarding wizard intercepts all pointer events before they reach the button underneath. This is the same issue from Round 3. Commit 322005c fixed the JavaScript code path but not the DOM interaction issue.
blockers.quickFixAttempted: Attempted normal click - failed. Used JavaScript eval as workaround to verify code path.

summary: Tested VAL-DISCOVERY-001: BLOCKED on normal click path. The Round 4 requirement was to validate a normal user click path (no JS workaround) while onboarding is incomplete. Normal click FAILED - the onboarding wizard still intercepts all pointer events and blocks the Run discovery button. However, the JavaScript code path WORKS correctly: triggerDiscoveryRun() -> openDiscoverySetupWizard() -> hides onboarding -> opens discovery wizard -> no POST sent. The fix from commit 322005c is incomplete - it handles the JavaScript function call but not the DOM pointer-events blocking issue. Recommend: Either (1) make the onboarding wizard non-modal with pointer-events:none on the overlay, or (2) add a click handler on the onboarding overlay that routes discovery-related clicks through to the underlying elements.
